notes: Core Frogger mechanics are present (vehicles, logs, turtles, homes, lives, timer, levels) but the frog position update is broken — frog.x is used for pixel position in river collision but frog.col drives rendering, causing desync; also frogHome is declared after first use and the LEVEL_CLEAR timer check uses gameTime (global) instead of a local elapsed timer, causing instant level skip issues.

A catastrophic logical flaw separates the visual column (frog.col) from the collision hitbox (frog.x), making the game completely unplayable as horizontal movement doesn't move your hitbox and logs don't move your sprite.

Core Frogger structure exists, but level progression timing is broken, frog/platform positioning is inconsistent, and movement/animation issues make it only moderately functional and not very playable.
